items.question: What does "by invitation only" actually mean? Can I still apply?
items.answer: Yes. Anyone can submit a request — "by invitation" simply means not every enquiry leads to an engagement. We limit our active partnerships to ensure dedicated personal strategy.

items.question: How much does this cost?
items.answer: Every engagement is bespoke and priced individually based on scope. We discuss this fully after an initial conversation once we understand your objectives.

items.question: How long does a typical engagement take?
items.answer: Most engagements run between 4 and 8 weeks, depending on scope. We agree on a clear timeline together before any work begins.
